description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn and enclosed by a fence. The house features a flat white roof with multiple skylights and a combination of brick and glass exterior walls. On one side, there is a large glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area, adjacent to a small swimming pool and a detached black-roofed outbuilding, possibly a garage or shed. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the longer sides of the house, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is located at the front, accessible via a small set of steps and marked by a wooden door. The property is landscaped with a driveway and some flowerbeds near the outbuilding.
description: A modern, single-story brick house with a flat white roof, glass sunroom, detached outbuilding, and fenced green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, brick facade, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of windows, glass sunroom, and detached outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glass sunroom, swimming pool, and outbuilding within the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with symmetrical windows, glass sunroom, and clear view of the pool and outbuilding.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with wooden door, small steps, and minimal overhang, no porch or columns.
